summary: Decent‑quality recording of the July 18 1989 show, celebrated for its hit‑filled three‑day run despite the lack of a Dark Star.
review: Reviewers are enthusiastic about this mid‑summer ’89 performance, noting that it was packed with classic Dead hits and delivered an overall high‑energy experience. No specific recording details were given, but the positive star ratings suggest the audio is at least listenable for most fans. The only notable criticism is the absence of a Dark Star in the set.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave high star ratings (two 5‑stars, one 4‑star) and praised the show’s energy; recording quality is not discussed, so rating leans on performance feedback.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer commented directly on sound quality; overall positive ratings imply the audio is acceptable for listening.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans describe the three‑day run as packed with hits and consistently high energy, though they note the set lacked a Dark Star.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Thanked for his contribution; no specific instrument comment.
band_member_comments.Phil: Thanked for his contribution; no specific instrument comment.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bill and Mickey thanked for their drumming.
